```{=html}
<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1em 1.4em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0.55em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.7em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.45em;color:#2C8475;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.8em;">01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;">Install</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.35em;">three tools</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.7em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.12);border-top:4px solid #3A7DC9;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#DCE9FA,#B5D0F0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.45em;color:#3A7DC9;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.8em;">02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;line-height:1.2;">One Page</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.35em;">your first site</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.7em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.12);border-top:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.45em;color:#C4881A;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.8em;">03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1.2;">Many Pages</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.35em;">add navigation</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.7em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);border-top:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.45em;color:#5654A2;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-weight:900;font-size:0.8em;">04</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">Theory</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.35em;">unpack the basics</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  use first &nbsp;<span style="color:#C4881A;">→</span>&nbsp; learn after
 </div>

</div>
```
